---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400&family=Lato:wght@300;400;700&display=swap');

  :root {
    --mww-brown:  #5C3D2E;
    --mww-tan:    #C8A87A;
    --mww-green:  #3B5249;
    --mww-cream:  #F7F2EA;
    --mww-dark:   #1E1309;
  }

  body { background: var(--mww-cream); }
  #quarto-content { padding: 0 !important; }
  .page-layout-full main { padding: 0 !important; }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════════
     SUCCESS SECTION
  ══════════════════════════════════════ */
  .success-wrap {
    min-height: 80vh;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    padding: 4rem 2rem;
    background: var(--mww-cream);
  }
  .success-card {
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 8px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(92,61,46,0.12);
    max-width: 560px;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 3.5rem 3rem;
    text-align: center;
    animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease both;
  }
  @keyframes fadeUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); }
    to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
  }

  .success-icon {
    width: 72px;
    height: 72px;
    background: var(--mww-green);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto 1.75rem;
  }
  .success-icon svg {
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    stroke: #fff;
    stroke-width: 2.5;
    fill: none;
    stroke-linecap: round;
    stroke-linejoin: round;
  }
  /* Animate the checkmark */
  .check-path {
    stroke-dasharray: 50;
    stroke-dashoffset: 50;
    animation: drawCheck 0.5s ease 0.3s forwards;
  }
  @keyframes drawCheck {
    to { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
  }

  .success-card h1 {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.2rem);
    color: var(--mww-brown);
    margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
  }
  .success-card .subhead {
    font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 1rem;
    color: #6b5040;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }

  .success-divider {
    border: none;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(200,168,122,0.4);
    margin: 0 0 2rem;
  }

  .success-note {
    background: var(--mww-cream);
    border-left: 3px solid var(--mww-tan);
    border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0;
    padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
    text-align: left;
    margin-bottom: 2rem;
  }
  .success-note p {
    font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.92rem;
    font-weight: 300;
    color: var(--mww-dark);
    line-height: 1.65;
    margin: 0;
  }
  .success-note strong {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--mww-brown);
  }

  .success-actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 1rem;
    justify-content: center;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .mww-btn {
    font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 0.85rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.12em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    padding: 0.75rem 2rem;
    border-radius: 2px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    display: inline-block;
  }
  .mww-btn-primary {
    background: var(--mww-tan);
    color: var(--mww-dark);
    border: 2px solid var(--mww-tan);
  }
  .mww-btn-primary:hover {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--mww-tan);
    text-decoration: none;
  }
  .mww-btn-outline {
    background: transparent;
    color: var(--mww-brown);
    border: 2px solid var(--mww-brown);
  }
  .mww-btn-outline:hover {
    background: var(--mww-brown);
    color: #fff;
    text-decoration: none;
  }
</style>

<section class="success-wrap">
  <div class="success-card">

    <div class="success-icon">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24">
        <path class="check-path" d="M5 13l4 4L19 7"/>
      </svg>
    </div>

    <h1>Order Received!</h1>
    <p class="subhead">
      Thank you for your purchase. Your piece is in good hands —
      every order is packed with care before it leaves the shop.
    </p>

    <hr class="success-divider">

    <div class="success-note">
      <p>
        <strong>What happens next?</strong><br>
        You'll receive a receipt from Stripe at the email you entered at checkout.
        Andrew will be in touch within 1–2 business days with shipping details.
        Feel free to reach out anytime at
        <a href="mailto:Murraywoodworksllc@gmail.com" style="color: var(--mww-brown);">Murraywoodworksllc@gmail.com</a>
        if you have questions.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="success-actions">
      <a href="shop.html" class="mww-btn mww-btn-primary">Back to Shop</a>
      <a href="gallery.html" class="mww-btn mww-btn-outline">View Gallery</a>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<script>
  // Clear the cart on successful purchase
  localStorage.removeItem('mww_cart');

  // Reset the cart count badge if it exists on this page
  const cartCount = document.getElementById('cart-count');
  if (cartCount) cartCount.textContent = '0';
</script>
```
